calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Feb-16-2007 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:27am
Judge Pro Tem Paul Guiterrez, clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Kwang Park appears as Respondent in Pro Per. Respondent, Kevin Wong Ly, dba Mekong Restaurant, appears through counsel, Paul Howard Melbostad, Esq. Parties are sworn.
Mr. Park, as respondent, states he has nothing new to add, but stated he might want to respond to arguments made by the respondent. Mr. Park responds.
10:00am
Matter is submitted. No new evidence is admitted or retained.
